title: John Lavorato
compiled_truth: John Lavorato is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-04-30), John Lavorato sent 1699 and received 3756 emails, totalling 5455 interactions. Top correspondents: [David Delainey](people/david-delainey) (122), [John Arnold](people/john-arnold) (118), [Louise Kitchen](people/louise-kitchen) (116), [David Oxley](people/david-oxley) (98), [Kimberly Hillis](people/kimberly-hillis) (86). Mailbox folders observed: _americas, _sent_mail, calendar, deleted_items, ect_admin, inbox.
